html:
A Drumstick is a Meat Food Item dropped when a Gobbler or Pengull is killed. Two raw drumsticks can be added to a Crock Pot along with another piece of meat, and 1 Fruit or Vegetable to produce a Turkey Dinner. A drumstick can also be used as a meat filler for other recipes, or dried on a Drying Rack for 1 day to produce a Small Jerky. Like other meats, a drumstick can be given to a Pig to have them follow the player, or to the Pig King in exchange for a Gold Nugget.

Fried Drumstick

A Fried Drumstick is a Drumstick that has been Cooked on a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star. When eaten, it replenishes 12.5 Hunger and 1 Health. If a Gobbler dies from being set on fire, it will drop a Fried Drumstick instead. A Fried Drumstick can be given to a Pig to have them follow the player, or to the Pig King in exchange for a Gold Nugget. It may also be used as a meat filler in the Crock Pot, however, the Turkey Dinner still requires two raw drumsticks as a prerequisite.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, Drumsticks can be acquired by killing Buzzards, a Moose/Goose or Moslings.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Drumsticks are dropped by Doydoys.

In the Hamlet DLC, Drumsticks are dropped by Peagawks or Thunderbirds and there is a chance to spawn in a Secret Bandit Camp.

Gallery

  • Original HD Drumstick icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD Cooked Drumstick icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

"drumstick"
“I should gobble it.”
–Wilson, when examining a Drumstick.
“Bang on the drum all day!”
–Willow, when examining a Drumstick.
“Leg meat for make legs more strong.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Drumstick.
“Makes a good thud, and it's nutritious!”
–Wendy, when examining a Drumstick.
“LIVING THINGS ARE MADE OF FASCINATING PARTS”
–WX-78, when examining a Drumstick.
“A leg of poultry.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Drumstick.
“October food.”
–Woodie, when examining a Drumstick.
“It tastes strangely like berries.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Drumstick.
“Raw fowl is not something I'd like to experiment eating.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Drumstick.
“Leg öf beastie, in my belly.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Drumstick.
“I just want to bang on my drum.”
–Webber, when examining a Drumstick.
“Does someone want to cook it for me?”
–Walani, when examining a Drumstick.
“Dark meat!”
–Warly, when examining a Drumstick.
“Meat treat for Woodlegs!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Drumstick.
“'TIS MEAT O' LITTLE BIRDY”
–Wilba, when examining a Drumstick.
“Not friend stick!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Drumstick.
“The original meat on a stick.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Drumstick.
“Can't say a raw drumstick sounds too appealing.”
–Winona, when examining a Drumstick.
“Ba-dum-chhh!”
–Wortox, when examining a Drumstick.
“Gluurph...”
–Wurt, when examining a Drumstick.
“Is it a good idea to eat raw meat...?”
–Walter, when examining a Drumstick.
“I'm in a hurry, it's fine enough as it is.”
–Wanda, when examining a Drumstick.
A Drumstick is a Meat Food Item dropped when a Gobbler or Pengull is killed. Two raw drumsticks can be added to a Crock Pot along with another piece of meat, and 1 Fruit or Vegetable to produce a Turkey Dinner. "drumstick_cooked"
“Now it's even tastier.”
–Wilson, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Do I satisfy my hunger or do I bang on the drum?”
–Willow, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Eat off bone is good.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Less raw, more tasty.”
–Wendy, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“A TASTE SENSATION”
–WX-78, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Not terribly healthy, but my is it delicious!”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Thanks, turkey.”
–Woodie, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Still tastes like berries.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“A protein packed appendage I can consume!”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Höööööt meat!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“We love finger food.”
–Webber, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“I feel like a warrior.”
–Walani, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Could use a light honey garlic glaze...”
–Warly, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Hot meat fer supper.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“FWOOSH'D LITTLE BIRDY LEG”
–Wilba, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“A stick for belly”
–Wormwood, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Still a bit furry.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Can't be beat.”
–Winona, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“It's been cooked now.”
–Wortox, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“You put bird in fire??”
–Wurt, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“That's better!”
–Walter, when examining a Fried Drumstick.
“Why do I always forget how much better cooked meat tastes...”
–Wanda, when examining a Fried Drumstick.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dùi Trống là một Thực Phẩm Thịt rơi ra khi Gà Tây hoặc Cánh Cụt Biển bị giết. Hai đùi sống có thể được thêm vào Nồi Hầm cùng với một miếng thịt khác và 1 Trái Cây hoặc Rau Củ để tạo ra Bữa Tối Thổ Nhĩ Kỳ. Dùi trống cũng có thể được sử dụng làm chất độn thịt cho các công thức nấu ăn khác, hoặc phơi khô trên Giá Phơi trong 1 ngày để tạo ra Thịt Khô Nhỏ. Giống như các loại thịt khác, dùi trống có thể được đưa cho Lợn để chúng đi theo người chơi hoặc cho Vua Lợn để đổi lấy Vàng Thỏi.
